intended_use_full: Workflow Box is a software system designed to allow users to route DICOM-compliant data to and from automated processing components. Workflow Box includes processing components for automatically contouring imaging data using deformable image registration and machine learning based algorithms. Workflow Box must be used in conjunction with appropriate software to review and edit results generated automatically by Workflow Box components, for example image visualization software must be used to facilitate the review and edit of contours generated by Workflow Box component applications. Workflow Box is not intended to automatically detect lesions.
